case_title: PATELCO CREDIT UNION A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT VS. ATHELA P CABALLERO ET AL

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION  A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION  A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CABALLERO, ATHELA P AN INDIVIDUAL CARSOLIN, ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 30 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-23-2019

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION  A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABALLERO, ATHELA P AN INDIVIDUAL CARSOLIN, ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL $4,961.91 PRINCIPAL, $1,950.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $340.20 INTEREST, $590.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,842.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100071434), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION  A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION SERVED APR-10-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CARSOLIN, ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL

SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100177653) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATELCO CREDIT UNION  A STATE CHARTERED CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT CABALLERO, ATHELA P AN INDIVIDUAL CARSOLIN, ANTONIO AN INDIVIDUAL

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100071434) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 30
